description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, angular design. The exterior features a combination of white and gray walls, large windows, and a prominent overhanging section on the upper floor. The front yard includes a manicured lawn with stepping stones leading to the main entrance, which is shaded by the upper floor. The rear of the house showcases a spacious patio area with a pergola, outdoor seating, and a small pool or water feature. Mature trees and shrubbery surround the property, providing privacy and greenery. The house is enclosed by a low, light-colored fence, enhancing its urban residential appeal.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, and a mix of white and gray exterior walls, surrounded by trees and a low fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, overhanging upper floor, large windows, and a manicured lawn with stepping stones.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting a small patio with outdoor furniture, partial fencing, and dense trees providing privacy.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a pergola-covered patio, outdoor seating, a small pool or water feature, and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat roof, rear patio area, and the continuation of the low fence and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and corner glazing
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway is recessed under the overhanging upper floor, featuring a simple door, no visible steps, and a minimalist approach with no porch or columns.
